title: schiedea lychnoides
intro: Schiedea lychnoides, also known as the Maui stonehenge or Hawaiian stonehenge, is a rare and endemic plant species native to the islands of Hawaii. It is a succulent plant with small, white flowers and has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. The plant's leaves and stems have been used to make herbal preparations, such as infusions and salves, which are said to have health benefits, including antimicrobial and antioxidant effects. Traditional Hawaiian healers have used Schiedea lychnoides to treat a variety of ailments, including skin conditions and respiratory issues.
